text:
is a 2nd year student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Mitabi has a short crop of brown hair, dark brown eyes, and a short beard.

Story

Mitabi is first seen training with a student in the Judo Club.

In the school's Sports Day games, Mitabi participates in the last game, shoulder wars. He and his team attempt to intercept an opposing Year 1 team, until he is held off by Armin and his team, who lunge themselves at Mitabi's.
